decisions.decision: Use actual code endpoints (e.g. /v1/markets/{id}/orders/probability-edit) not the task description endpoints which are wrong
Use minimal response stubs matching the existing test pattern — just enough fields to prove the function was called and returned data
Two tests per paginated function (no-params and with-params) following the getMarketAnalytics precedent
Verify X-Bayes-Agent-Id header is set from session.agentId for all session-bearing POST functions
alternatives_rejected: Only verify URL and HTTP method, skip header assertion

decisions.decision: Test createMarket both with and without session to cover the optional session POST path

steps.task: Add imports for all 10 uncovered functions to api-client.test.ts: createMarket, getMarketEvents, getMarketComments, getEngineStats, submitProbabilityEdit, resolveMarket, getHealth, getServiceIndex, submitEventTrade, submitMarketComment
Add tests for simple GET functions: getEngineStats → /v1/markets/{id}/engine-stats, getHealth → /health, getServiceIndex → /

Add tests for GET functions with optional pagination: getMarketEvents (no params → /v1/markets/{id}/events, with params → ?fromSeq=5&limit=10), getMarketComments (no params → /v1/markets/{id}/comments, with params → ?fromSeq=0&limit=20)
Add tests for createMarket POST with optional session: (1) without session — verify POST method, URL /v1/markets, body, Content-Type header; (2) with session — also verify X-Bayes-Agent-Id header

Add tests for POST functions with required session: submitProbabilityEdit → /v1/markets/{id}/orders/probability-edit, resolveMarket → /v1/markets/{id}/resolve, submitEventTrade → /v1/markets/{id}/orders/event-trade, submitMarketComment → /v1/markets/{id}/comments. Each test verifies method, URL, JSON body, Content-Type, and X-Bayes-Agent-Id header
Run vitest to verify all existing + new tests pass. Fix any failures.
